summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of CI/CD Healing Agent dashboard completed successfully. All 15 specified test flows passed with 100% success rate. The authentication redirect issue from previous iteration has been completely resolved. The application demonstrates excellent functionality with polished UI, real-time healing processes, and seamless navigation.
passed_tests: User Registration flow with redirect to dashboard
User Login flow with existing credentials and redirect
Dashboard loads with correct statistics display
Seed Demo button populates sample data successfully
Simulate Failure button creates new failures
Pipeline Runs page navigation and data loading
Pipeline Runs search filter functionality (text and status)
Pipeline run row click navigation to detail page
Failure detail page displays logs and error information
Trigger Healing button initiates healing process
Real-time healing timeline with step-by-step progress
AI Analysis display with confidence, root cause, and fix details
Healing History page shows comprehensive attempt list
Settings page loads with configuration options
Settings save functionality works correctly
Complete sidebar navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Pipeline Runs, Healing History, Settings)
Logout functionality with proper redirect to login
Authentication state persistence and protection
Toast notifications for user feedback
Professional dark UI theme with proper contrast
Responsive design and interactive elements
Real-time data updates and loading states
